translations.en: a plump blond man with curly blond hair and a cheerful face.
translations.zh: 一位身形圓潤、金色捲髮、面帶笑容的男子。

translations.en: "Hello again, Avatar!"
"Hello hello!"
"What can I do for you this $T?"
"That's funny. I remember your name!"
"My name's Aaron."
"I run the sawmill! Is there anything I can do for thee?"
translations.zh: 「吾經營鋸木廠！有什麼吾能為汝效勞的嗎？」

translations.en: "Yes, I saw logs into @boards."
"Come to my shop when I'm open!"
"My mill makes smooth boards and planks out of rough-cut logs."
translations.zh: 「吾的鋸木廠把粗切的原木鋸成光滑的木板和厚板。」

translations.en: "Aye, I see $Y has a yew log." He inspects the wood with a practiced eye.
translations.zh: 「嗯，吾看到 $Y 有根紫杉原木。」他以行家的眼光審視木材。

translations.en: "Good grain. Yes, I can make a fine board out of this log."
translations.zh: 「紋路不錯。是的，吾可以用這根原木做出一塊好木板。」

translations.en: "But it will cost thee 5 gold, $Y!"
"Still interested?"
"Farewell!"
"Beg pardon?"
"Sorry, but I can't work for free!"
"Come back when you have the 5 gold!"
Aaron goes to his saw and turns the log into a flat, sanded board.
translations.zh: 亞倫走向鋸子，把原木切成一塊平整磨光的木板。

translations.en: "There!" He hands $Y the finished product.
"Oh. Well, perhaps some other time then."

translator_notes: 亞倫是密諾克的鋸木廠老闆，性格開朗。他能把紫杉原木（Ben 出售）鋸成紫杉木板（Julia 製作排笛所需），收費 5 金。是排笛任務的中間環節。
